title: Ubiquiti UBB-XG, UniFi Building Bridge XG, single unit
category: Ubiquiti UBB-XG, UniFi Building Bridge XG, single unit
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Building Bridge XG is a 60GHz PtP bridge with a 5GHz backup , designed to extend your network, for example to a neighbouring building. The unit is equipped with (1) SFP+ slot, (1) 1Gbit PoE++-In port, delivers throughput of up to 6Gbps and supports a maximum range of up to 500m . For alignment, it features integrated LED lighting on the sides that indicates the direction the unit should be adjusted to achieve a better signal Device Fine tuning bracket Gigabit PoE injector 48V/0.65A
specsSearch: Wireless features Channel bandwidth [MHz] 2160, 1080 Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 60GHz [Mb/s] 6000 Output power 60GHz [dBm] 16 Security WPA2 AES Antenna gain [dBi] 21 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Other features Bluetooth Power Power over Ethernet 802.3bt, 48V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 29
